query:
SELECT 
  'users' as tabela,
  email,
  HEX(email) as email_hex,
  LENGTH(email) as tamanho
FROM users 
WHERE email LIKE '%vendas8%'
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  'vendedores' as tabela,
  email,
  HEX(email) as email_hex,
  LENGTH(email) as tamanho
FROM vendedores 
WHERE email LIKE '%vendas8%';
